word: G5033 - τάχιστα - táchista - takh'-is-tah - + with all speed

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: + with all speed
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter plural of the superlative of G5036 (as adverb); most quickly, that is, (with G5613 prefixed) as soon as possible: - + with all speed.
